description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe featuring a bold, abstract multicolor pattern across its upper, blending shades of cream, purple, yellow, and hints of green and orange. The shoe has a robust, chunky sole in a deep purple color, with sculpted geometric details and a prominent side swoosh-like design. The laces are dark brown and follow a standard criss-cross pattern, threading through reinforced eyelets that add to the shoe's structural integrity. The collar and tongue are padded for comfort, and the interior lining appears to be a light yellow-green. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban fashion or streetwear. The shoe appears to be in pristine, unworn condition with no visible scuffs or dirt.
description: A high-top, multicolored athletic shoe with a chunky purple sole and abstract patterned upper, featuring dark brown laces and padded collar. The design is modern, bold, and in new condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the abstract patterned upper, deep purple sole, and a swoosh-like design on the side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dark brown criss-cross laces, padded tongue, and the rounded toe with visible pattern details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same abstract pattern, purple sole, and structural details on the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded heel collar, back seam, and continuation of the abstract pattern.
